title: TaqMan SNP genotyping protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"67srn","text":"The protocol is based on TaqMan SNP genotyping protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"79mvl","text":"-Extract and purify genomic DNA (gDNA) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b8usk","text":"-Quantify sample gDNA ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"892ua","text":"-Prepare assays, DNA samples, and master mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"36m5a","text":"Dilute the predesigned and custom TaqMan SNP genotyping assays to 20X working stock solution","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7sl0i","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"341ti","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f54e6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 384-well Fast (5‐μL reaction ) Prepare the reaction mix: Combine the following components for the number of reactions required, plus 10% overage. 2X TaqMan Master Mix: 2.5 µL 20X Assay Working Stock: 0.25 µL Total volume per well: 2.75 µL
Centrifuge to bring the reaction mix to the bottom of the tube and remove the air bubbles
Prepare the reaction plate: Dilute each DNA sample, positive and negative controls in Nuclease-free water. The final concentration should be at least 0.2 ng/μL
Add reaction mix to each well of the reaction plate
Seal the plate with adhesive film, then centrifuge to bring the reaction mix to the bottom of the well and eliminate air bubbles.
Remove film from the plate, then add the appropriate volume of sample or control to the wells
Seal the plate with adhesive film, then centrifuge to bring the reaction mix to the bottom of the well and eliminate air bubbles.

Place the plate in a Real-Time PCR instrument ABI 7900 HT. Use the thermal cycling conditions specified. Polymerase activation: Temp. 95 °C , Time 10mins , Cycles HOLD Denaturation: Temp. 95 °C , Time 15 seconds, Cycles 40 Annealing extension: Temp. 60 °C , Time 1 min, Cycles 40
creator: Jing Jin
